text.title: MLP Planning Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying mlp planning end-to-end.

step.name: audit-layers
step.action: Score each of the 4 layers 0-5 with cited evidence.
step.decision-gate: If any layer score has no evidence, re-audit before continuing.

step.name: gate-base
step.action: If functional or reliable <3, block delight backlog and route to bug-fixing.
step.decision-gate: If base broken, exit MLP path until base >=3.

step.name: build-delight-backlog
step.action: Use sonnet to draft delight items; each requires >=1 verbatim quote.
step.decision-gate: If any item lacks a quote, reject.

step.name: sprint
step.action: Run a bounded delight sprint (<=14d, single theme); measure delta against target.
step.decision-gate: If window closes with no retention delta, return to audit; do not chain sprints blindly.
